$comment: scripts/SilphCo7F.asm — the grateful worker's LAPRAS (GivePokemon): the party takes it, or a full party sends it to BILL's PC with SentToBoxText instead of the received line (gh #157) — party_count branches BEFORE the give. Once GOT_LAPRAS, the worker only worries after the PRESIDENT.

else.text:

not a ROCKET! You
came to save us? I want you to
have this POKéMON
for saving us.
